purpose: Copy-paste friendly AI_OS terminal identity markers for Anthony's local runtime spine work.

markers.name: AI_OS MAIN CONTROL
markers.role: Primary operator terminal for runtime spine commands and final coordination.
allowed_use: Check repo status and review validator output
Paste approved git commands with explicit file paths

markers.name: CODEX BUILD LANE
markers.role: Focused build window for approved repo-scoped implementation work.
allowed_use: Report files created, changed, validation, git status, commit, and push state

markers.name: VALIDATOR WORKER
markers.role: Validation-only window for checks, parser tests, and read-only verification.
allowed_use: Parse changed JSON or PowerShell files
Report PASS, WARN, or FAIL plainly

markers.name: PACKET QUEUE
markers.role: Queue review window for workload packets, command packs, and next safe tasks.
allowed_use: Sort next work by runtime-spine value

markers.name: APPROVAL INBOX
markers.role: Decision window for approvals, stop conditions, and user-controlled checkpoints.
allowed_use: Approve or reject exact APPLY scopes
Confirm explicit git add, commit, push, or PR steps

markers.name: RECOVERY HEALTH
markers.role: Recovery and health-check window for failures, mismatches, and blocked states.
allowed_use: Mark UNKNOWN, MISMATCH, or INVALID DATA when evidence requires it

markers.name: STANDBY WORKER
markers.role: Idle worker window reserved for approved next tasks only.
allowed_use: Run read-only status checks when asked
